parsed.clarification_question: Should the look focus on writing polish only, or on technical argument and claim strength as well?

rationale.R1.6: The delegation targets a paragraph, so sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, flow, and register are the most plausible central responsibility.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection should disclose uncertainty because the request is underspecified.
rationale.RX.2: The artifact contains strong novelty and standardization claims, so avoiding inflated responsibility beyond the delegation is active.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must not rewrite or critique the paragraph, only project the requested responsibilities.
rationale.RX.4: Because the paragraph concerns research claims and market-relevant methods, downstream misuse from overinterpreting the delegation should be avoided.
rationale.RX.5: The projection should remain traceable to the exact wording of the delegation and artifact.
